category: Document Automation and Intelligent Document Processing (IDP)
description: Benchmark data for document automation projects including Accounts Payable automation, intelligent document processing (IDP), and digital mailroom implementations in mid-market companies. Sources include analyst firms (Ardent Partners, Levvel Research, Gartner), vendor benchmarks, and industry surveys.

data_points.metric: Average cost to process one supplier invoice manually
data_points.source: Ardent Partners AP Metrics and Management Study 2024; Levvel Research AP Report 2023

data_points.metric: Average cost to process one supplier invoice with full automation
data_points.source: Ardent Partners Best-in-Class AP Benchmarking Report 2024

data_points.metric: Average time to process one supplier invoice (manual)
data_points.value: 10.1 days from receipt to payment approval
data_points.source: Levvel Research Payables Insight Report 2023; IOFM AP Benchmark Survey

data_points.metric: Average time to process one supplier invoice (automated)
data_points.value: 3.2 days from receipt to payment approval

data_points.metric: Invoice automation rate – Best-in-Class AP departments
data_points.value: 84% of invoices processed straight-through without manual intervention
data_points.source: Ardent Partners Best-in-Class AP Benchmarking 2024 (top 20% of performers)

data_points.metric: Invoice automation rate – Average AP department

data_points.value: 91% of invoices matched automatically to PO and goods receipt
data_points.source: IOFM Institute of Finance and Management AP Benchmark Survey 2023

data_points.metric: Early payment discount capture rate – automated vs. manual
data_points.value: Automated: 74% capture; Manual: 18% capture. Annual value: 0.8–2.4% of spend
data_points.source: Ardent Partners State of ePayables 2024; Deloitte Global CPO Survey

data_points.value: 97–99% field-level accuracy after validation rules applied
data_points.source: Gartner Market Guide for Intelligent Document Processing 2024

data_points.metric: OCR/IDP accuracy for unstructured invoices (AI-based extraction)
data_points.value: 88–95% field-level accuracy before human validation; 99%+ after human review
data_points.source: Gartner Magic Quadrant for IDP 2024; ABBYY FlexiCapture benchmarks

data_points.metric: Payback period for AP automation investment
data_points.source: Ardent Partners ROI Analysis; Levvel Research 2023

data_points.metric: FTE productivity improvement with AP automation
data_points.value: AP staff process 3x more invoices per FTE; or 50–65% FTE cost reduction
data_points.source: McKinsey Digital Automation in Finance 2023; Basware customer case studies

data_points.metric: Error rate reduction with document automation
data_points.value: Manual error rate: 5–12%; Automated: 0.5–2%. 85% reduction achieved
data_points.source: Gartner Finance Automation Research 2024; Kofax IDP Benchmark Report
Industry analyst estimates; DocuWare, M-Files, OpenText partner pricing data

data_points.metric: Document retrieval time improvement (physical vs. digital archive)
data_points.value: Physical archive: 5–30 minutes per document; Digital: 10–30 seconds. 95% time saving
data_points.source: AIIM Industry Watch Report on Content Management 2023

data_points.metric: Paper and printing cost per employee per year (pre-automation)
data_points.value: €800 – €1,800 per office worker (paper, ink, printers, maintenance, storage)
data_points.source: Quocirca Print Industry Landscape Report 2024; Gartner Print Cost Analysis

data_points.metric: Physical document storage cost per filing cabinet per year
data_points.value: €1,000 – €2,500 per cabinet including space, handling, and retrieval labor
data_points.source: AIIM Cost of Managing Paper Documents Research 2023

data_points.metric: Time spent by finance staff searching for documents (pre-automation)
data_points.value: Finance employees spend average 30% of time searching for documents and data
data_points.source: McKinsey The Social Economy Report (productivity research); IDC Document Challenges Study
